title: How Bernard Arnault works to keep his media outlets in line
subhed: 'Bernard Arnault's Empire' (4/6). Since the 1990s, the CEO of LVMH has built a small media galaxy in print and radio, which he uses to convey his ideas and tastes, but also to promote his brands.

Wildfires ravage parts of southern France, Italy and Spain
subhed: Thousands have been evacuated amid wildfires that have been raging for days across several regions in Europe. Scientists agree that climate change caused by humans burning fossil fuels is making extreme weather events such as fires increasingly severe.

title: Kremlin propagandist Xenia Fedorova escapes EU sanctions targeting Russian figures
subhed: The French Foreign Ministry and Interior Ministry are quietly exploring alternative sanctions against the pro-Russian CNews personality, former head of Russia Today France, a channel funded by the Kremlin.

title: After exoplanets, the hunt for 'exomoons' begins
subhed: An international team has identified an object orbiting a brown dwarf, which itself revolves around a star twice as small as our Sun. The findings were published Wednesday in the journal 'Nature.'

title: Friterie des Nations, a local institution at the Calais Beach
subhed: Gourmet kiosks (1/6). Across France, small kiosks serving local specialties are a favorite stop for holidaymakers. In Calais, northern France, Pascal Carré and his daughter Loranne serve fries that are crisp on the outside and soft on the inside.

How social media bans for young users, now in effect in France, have spread worldwide
subhed: France has decided to ban those under 15 from major platforms such as Instagram and TikTok. The country is following a global trend that has gained momentum in recent years.

title: New monkey species identified in Lomami National Park, Democratic Republic of Congo
subhed: First photographed in 2008, this small colobus monkey with pink-orange lips has now been officially described by an international team of researchers – and may be immediately classified as 'endangered.'

title: 20 men, a 'sperm party,' and two days of sexual torment: The brutality of the 'libertine' rapes case
subhed: Over the course of a long weekend, one of Christophe B.'s former partners was forced to endure sexual assaults by numerous men at their home. Some of these assaults were broadcast live on the swinging website Wyylde.
